steps.t: An expert jeweller in Minas Tirith may be able to use his tools to read the markings on the corrupted shard for you. Such a jeweller plies his trade o…
One jeweller sent you to another. Perhaps the expert jeweller in Snowbourn, the city of Rohan in the Sutcrofts, will be able to read the markings on t…
The jeweller in Snowbourn sent you to the village of Aldburg, in the Eastfold, to ask a Bard of Rohan about the tusk-shard.
Eldmath has gone ahead into the field, inspired by the promise of adventure and planned to meet you north-east of Aldburg.
Eldmath ran off during the fighting, and you should find him. He cannot have gone far.
Elrond is at the Haven of Orladion in Rivendell, north-west of the Last Homely House. You have cleansed the corruption from the Vengeance of Folca and…
